title: Districts and Uses
summary: Zoning districts, permitted uses, and overlays.

sections.title: Section 2-1 Zoning Districts
sections.excerpt: The city is divided into zoning districts as shown on the official zoning map.

sections.title: Section 2-2 Permitted Uses
sections.excerpt: Permitted uses by district are listed in the use tables.

sections.title: Section 2-3 Special Use Permits
sections.excerpt: Special uses require review and approval by the zoning board.
